hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; stripped=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | sed -E 's/uv run (--[^ ]+ +)*python3?/UVPY/g'); if printf '%s' "$stripped" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:];&|()`])(python|python3)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use \"uv run python\" (or \"uv run --only-group=<group> python\") instead of bare python/python3. This project manages its Python environment with uv, and bare python will bypass the project virtualenv."}}'; fi; }
